---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
subtitle: "Shiva Sagar — Data Science Student"
date: "April 2025"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: article
---

<style>
.cv-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem; border-bottom: 3px solid #2563eb; padding-bottom: 1rem; }
.cv-section { margin-top: 2rem; }
.cv-item { margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
.cv-item h4 { margin: 0; color: #0f172a; }
.cv-item .org { font-weight: 600; color: #2563eb; }
.cv-item .period { float: right; color: #64748b; font-size: 0.9rem; }
.skill-tag { background: #eff6ff; color: #1e40af; border-radius: 0.4rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.7rem; font-size: 0.85rem; display: inline-block; margin: 0.15rem; }
@media print { .skill-tag { border: 1px solid #2563eb; } .cv-item .period { float: right; } }
</style>

:::: {.cv-header}
# Shiva Sagar

**Data Science Student | Community Leader | Science Advocate**
{{< fa envelope >}} shiva.sagar@keuka.edu &nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa brands github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/shivasagarsulige2-rgb){target="_blank"} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa brands linkedin >}} [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shiva-sagar){target="_blank"} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa location-dot >}} Penn Yan, New York
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa graduation-cap >}} Education

:::: {.cv-item}
#### Bachelor of Science — Data Science
[Keuka College]{.org} [2021 – 2025 (Expected)]{.period}

Relevant modules: Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing, Data Visualisation, Statistical Methods, Database Systems, Research Methods & Ethics.
::::
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa briefcase >}} Work Experience

:::: {.cv-item}
#### Field Period and ePortfolio Demonstrator / Instructor
[Keuka College]{.org} [2023 – Present]{.period}

- Guide students through building professional ePortfolios using Quarto and GitHub Pages
- Demonstrate reproducible research practices, version control with Git, and Python-based data analysis
- Provide one-on-one support for Quarto configuration, SCSS styling, and project page development
::::

:::: {.cv-item}
#### Social Media Manager — Science Club
[Keuka College Science Club]{.org} [2023 – Present]{.period}

- Manage club social media presence and digital communications
- Create engaging content to promote science events and increase student participation
::::
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa users >}} Leadership & Student Organisations

:::: {.cv-item}
#### President — Science Club
[Keuka College]{.org} [2024 – Present]{.period}

- Lead executive board and direct student-driven science initiatives on campus
- Coordinate events, guest speakers, and outreach activities
::::

:::: {.cv-item}
#### Vice President — Science Club
[Keuka College]{.org} [2023 – 2024]{.period}

- Assisted the President in managing club operations and membership engagement
::::

:::: {.cv-item}
#### Treasurer & Establishing Member — DACE
[Disability, Accessibility, Community, and Engagement, Keuka College]{.org} [2023 – Present]{.period}

- Founding member; manage club budget and financial reporting
- Advocate for accessibility policies and inclusive campus initiatives
::::

:::: {.cv-item}
#### President — Campus Activities Board
[Keuka College]{.org} [2022]{.period}

- Oversaw campus-wide event planning and student engagement programming
- Served concurrently as Interfaith and Intercultural Community Coordinator
::::

:::: {.cv-item}
#### Student Senate Representative — Nursing Club
[Keuka College]{.org} [2021 – 2022]{.period}

- Represented Nursing Club interests in student governance
::::
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa code >}} Technical Skills

**Languages:**
[Python]{.skill-tag} [SQL]{.skill-tag} [R]{.skill-tag} [Bash]{.skill-tag}

**Machine Learning:**
[Scikit-learn]{.skill-tag} [XGBoost]{.skill-tag} [Hugging Face Transformers]{.skill-tag} [BERT]{.skill-tag} [T5]{.skill-tag}

**Data & Visualisation:**
[Plotly]{.skill-tag} [Pandas]{.skill-tag} [NumPy]{.skill-tag} [Matplotlib]{.skill-tag} [Seaborn]{.skill-tag}

**Tools & Platforms:**
[Git]{.skill-tag} [GitHub]{.skill-tag} [Quarto]{.skill-tag} [VS Code]{.skill-tag} [Jupyter]{.skill-tag}
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa certificate >}} Certifications

| Certification | Issuer | Year |
|---|---|---|
| Python for Everybody Specialisation | Coursera / University of Michigan | 2023 |
| Introduction to Machine Learning | Kaggle | 2024 |
| Git & GitHub Foundations | GitHub Education | 2024 |
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa star >}} Selected Projects

| Project | Description | Stack |
|---|---|---|
| BERT vs T5 Sentiment Analysis | Compared discriminative vs generative NLP models on Amazon Polarity dataset | Python, Transformers, Plotly |
| Interactive E-Commerce Dashboard | Built a seasonal sales analytics dashboard with Plotly | Python, Pandas, Plotly |
| Scikit-Learn Model Showdown | Benchmarked Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and XGBoost on customer-churn data | Python, Scikit-learn, Plotly |
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa heart >}} Volunteer & Community Service

| Organisation | Role | Period |
|---|---|---|
| Everybunny Counts Rabbit Rescue | Animal Care Volunteer | 2022 – Present |
| H.O.R.S.E. of Connecticut | Equine Therapy Volunteer | 2022 – Present |
| American Red Cross | Blood Drive Volunteer | 2021 – Present |
| Jim Casey Foundation | Youth Leadership Institute Participant | 2022 |
| CT Department of Children & Families | Youth Advisory Board Member | 2021 – 2022 |
| Faith Living Church | Nursery & Childcare Volunteer | 2021 – Present |
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa globe >}} Languages

**English** — Native/Fluent
::::

---

*References available upon request — see [Contact](../contact.qmd) page.*
